## Summary / 概要

- Concise summary of the change.

## Changes / 変更内容

- Main implementation or documentation changes.

## Tests / 検証

- Commands run and results.

## Review Notes / レビュー観点

- Areas where reviewer attention is most useful.

## Risks / 残リスク

- Remaining behavioral, documentation, or compatibility risks.

## Unknowns / 未確認事項

- Relevant checks or assumptions that remain unverified.

## Cost Impact / 費用影響

- State whether the change requires any paid service or external spend.
